name: social_like
description: Like a social media post on a specified platform

platform.description: Social media platform (e.g. twitter, instagram, mastodon)

post_id.description: Unique identifier of the post to like

api_key.description: API key or access token for the platform

instance_url.description: Mastodon instance URL (e.g. https://mastodon.social). Required for Mastodon.
